candidate_problem_record.subject: 数学、物理、生物、化学
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: A basketball team has the following heights and weights. What is the height for the 25th percentile? (Final Answer is a value)
candidate_problem_record.raw_answer_text: \answer{69.5} The height for the 25th percentile is the same as the first quartile. That is 69.5, the median from the lower half of the data.
